details.reasoning: Implementation is comprehensive and well-structured with nearly all requirements met. ✓ package.json has @openclaw/pulseboard scoped name and setupEntry field. ✓ openclaw.plugin.json includes channels and configSchema. ✓ src/types.ts defines PulseBoardAccountConfig, PulseBoardConfig, and PulseBoardInboundMessage. ✓ src/runtime.ts uses createPluginRuntimeStore with getPulseBoardRuntime/setPulseBoardRuntime accessors. ✓ src/channel.ts uses createChatChannelPlugin with chatTypes ['direct', 'group'], textChunkLimit 4000, outbound.sendText, gateway.startAccount, and messaging.normalizeTarget. ✓ index.ts uses defineChannelPluginEntry. ✓ setup-entry.ts uses defineSetupPluginEntry. ✓ Only new files created in pulseboard directory. ⚠ Field naming discrepancy: rubric specifies 'boardUrl and apiToken' but implementation uses 'apiUrl and apiKey'. While semantically equivalent and arguably better naming, this doesn't match the spec exactly. All other aspects are solid.
